subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the realms of God under the protection and shelter of God! I would sacrifice my soul for all who have arisen in servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی دیار الله فی صون حمایه الله فدیت بروحی کل من قام بالعبودیه
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @unity of thought and belief
